name: WHA-HTTP
postCreateCommand: bun install && apt-get update && apt-get install -y wget curl jq && wget -O /usr/local/bin/rpm https://github.com/zevlion/rpm/releases/download/latest/rpm && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/rpm && wget -qO- https://github.com/zevlion/zevBot/releases/download/alpha/zevBot-linux-amd64.tar.gz | tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin/ && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/zevBot
